since_last: 31% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.32%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.21% · BTC -1.29% · Gold +1.56% · Nasdaq100 -0.69%. 31% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.32%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.32%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +14.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +14.47%, SYNA +5.04%, DELL +4.86%, OKLO +3.07%, AVAV +2.96%. Laggards: GEV -5.98%, SKHY -4.83%, DDOG -3.42%, PATH -3.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.67% at $122.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
